languages.text: {n}Вы замечаете, как напряженные, обезображенные тяжелой судьбой лица разглаживаются. Глава процессии поднимает над головой железную руку — и следом за ним в воздух поднимаются прочие протезы — те, которые вообще возможно поднять.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Вы замечаете, как на напряженных, истертых тяжелой работой лицах участников процессии зажигаются улыбки — одна за другой. Глава процессии поднимает над головой аугментированную руку — и следом за ним в воздух поднимаются прочие аугменты — те, которые вообще возможно поднять.{/n}

languages.text: {n}One after another, each face, disfigured by burdensome fate, eases. The head of the procession raises a metal arm above his head — and all those able to follow suit, until a sea of prosthetics are held aloft.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Вы замечаете, как напряженные, обезображенные тяжелой судьбой лица разглаживаются. Глава процессии поднимает над головой железную руку — и следом за ним в воздух поднимаются прочие протезы — те, которые вообще возможно поднять.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}One after another, each face, disfigured by burdensome fate, eases. The head of the procession raises a metal arm above his head — and all those able to follow suit, until a sea of prosthetics are held aloft.{/n}

{n}One after another, each face, disfigured by burdensome fate, lights up with a smile. The head of the procession raises an augmented arm above his head — and all those able to follow suit, until a sea of augments are held aloft.{/n}

{n}One after another, each face, disfigured by burdensome fate, eases. The head of the procession raises a metal arm above his head — and all those able to follow suit, until a sea of prosthetics are held aloft.{/n}

{n}One after another, each face, disfigured by burdensome fate, eases. The head of the procession raises a metal arm above his head — and all those able to follow suit, until a sea of prosthetics are held aloft.{/n}

languages.text: {n}重荷の運命に歪められた顔は、次々と笑顔を浮かべる。先頭の人物は、腕を高く掲げ、その真似をする人たちが続々と腕を高く掲げる。そして、腕を高く掲げる人たちが、海のように広がる。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}One after another, each face, disfigured by burdensome fate, lights up with a smile. The head of the procession raises an augmented arm above his head — and all those able to follow suit, until a sea of augments are held aloft.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Ağır kaderin şekil verdiği yüzler, birbiri ardına gevşiyor. Kafilenin başı, metal kolunu başının üzerine kaldırıyor. Bu hareketi yapabilen herkes ona uyuyor ve sonunda bir sürü protez havaya kalkıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}One after another, each face, disfigured by burdensome fate, eases. The head of the procession raises a metal arm above his head — and all those able to follow suit, until a sea of prosthetics are held aloft.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Ağır kaderin şekil verdiği yüzler, birbiri ardına gevşiyor. Kafilenin başı, metal kolunu başının üzerine kaldırıyor. Bu hareketi yapabilen herkes ona uyuyor ve sonunda bir sürü protez havaya kalkıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}一张张被残酷命运蚀刻的面庞接连缓和了下来。为首的男人将一只金属手臂高举过头顶——所有能效仿者纷纷跟随，转瞬间甲板上升起了一片金属义体的森林。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}One after another, each face, disfigured by burdensome fate, eases. The head of the procession raises a metal arm above his head — and all those able to follow suit, until a sea of prosthetics are held aloft.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}一张张被残酷命运蚀刻的面庞接连缓和了下来。为首的男人将一只金属手臂高举过头顶——所有能效仿者纷纷跟随，转瞬间甲板上升起了一片金属义体的森林。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Nach und nach hellen sich die entstellten Gesichter der Anwesenden auf. Der Anführer der Prozession hebt einen metallenen Arm über den Kopf ... und alle, die dazu in der Lage sind, folgen seinem Beispiel, bis ein Meer aus erhobenen Prothesen entsteht.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}One after another, each face, disfigured by burdensome fate, eases. The head of the procession raises a metal arm above his head — and all those able to follow suit, until a sea of prosthetics are held aloft.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Nach und nach hellen sich die entstellten Gesichter der Anwesenden auf. Der Anführer der Prozession hebt einen metallenen Arm über den Kopf ... und alle, die dazu in der Lage sind, folgen seinem Beispiel, bis ein Meer aus erhobenen Prothesen entsteht.{/n}

languages.text: {n}L'un après l'autre, chaque visage, défiguré par un destin éprouvant, se détend. Le chef de la procession lève un bras de métal au-dessus de sa tête, et tous ceux qui sont capables d'en faire autant suivent son exemple, jusqu'à ce qu'une véritable mer de prothèses se dresse sous vos yeux.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}One after another, each face, disfigured by burdensome fate, eases. The head of the procession raises a metal arm above his head — and all those able to follow suit, until a sea of prosthetics are held aloft.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}L'un après l'autre, chaque visage, défiguré par un destin éprouvant, se détend. Le chef de la procession lève un bras de métal au-dessus de sa tête, et tous ceux qui sont capables d'en faire autant suivent son exemple, jusqu'à ce qu'une véritable mer de prothèses se dresse sous vos yeux.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Uno tras otro, los rostros desfigurados por los avatares del destino se calman. El cabeza de la procesión levanta el brazo metálico por encima de la cabeza, y todos los que pueden imitan el gesto, elevando un mar de prótesis.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}One after another, each face, disfigured by burdensome fate, eases. The head of the procession raises a metal arm above his head — and all those able to follow suit, until a sea of prosthetics are held aloft.{/n}
